description: Cute/chibi-style 2D character sprites with multiple animation states. Includes PSD source files.
usage: Player characters, NPCs, overworld sprites

visual.palette: full color, saturated
visual.notes: Clean chibi characters, thick outlines. Pairs well with segel2dcharactersbundle.

description: Cave and underground tileset for RPG games.
usage: Underground levels, cave biomes, dungeon interiors

visual.palette: dark reds, black, brown
visual.notes: Dark cave tileset. RPGMaker A/B tile layout. Pairs with dungeon tileset from same creator.

description: Dungeon tileset with animated tiles and autotile support.
usage: Dungeon floors, walls, animated tiles for RPGMaker or custom engine

visual.palette: brown, tan, warm stone tones
visual.notes: Dungeon tileset with autotile support. Same creator/style as cave tileset.

description: Japanese-themed environment tileset.
usage: Japanese town/village environments

visual.palette: pastel — soft pinks, blues, greens, warm tans
visual.notes: Cute/soft Japanese town tileset. Pastel palette stands apart from darker RPG packs. Unique aesthetic.

description: Large pack of medieval fantasy character sprites with many classes and animation states.
usage: RPG player characters, enemies, NPCs — medieval fantasy setting

visual.palette: varied, muted medieval tones
visual.notes: Very small pixel characters. Large variety of classes. Standard RPGMaker-scale sprites.

description: General medieval RPG asset pack — mix of tiles, props, and decorative elements.
usage: Medieval RPG environments, general-purpose sprites

visual.palette: blue-green, teal, muted
visual.notes: Quirky bird/creature-style characters with full animation sets. Slightly larger scale than medievalfantasycharacters.

description: Medieval skill and ability icons for RPG UI. Includes PSD source files.
usage: Skill trees, ability bars, inventory UI, spell icons

visual.render_method: digital painting, dark background with glow
visual.palette: dark backgrounds, vibrant glowing colors, blues and teals
visual.notes: High quality painted icons with glowing effects on dark BG. Pairs with medievaltechnologyandskillicons (same style/creator).

description: Technology and crafting skill icons for RPG UI. Includes PSD source files.
usage: Tech trees, crafting menus, upgrade screens

visual.render_method: digital painting, dark background with glow
visual.palette: dark backgrounds, earthy browns, blue glows
visual.notes: Same creator/style as medievalskillandabilityicons. Focuses on crafting and tech skills.

description: Outdoor and forest environment tileset with animated elements. Includes Aseprite source files.
usage: Forest biomes, outdoor overworld maps

visual.palette: warm orange, brown, earthy
visual.notes: Small pixel art. Animated chest frames. Warm earthy palette.

description: Pixel art house interiors and furniture sprites. Includes Aseprite source files.
usage: Indoor scenes, house interiors, furniture decoration

visual.palette: dark red, charcoal, warm tones
visual.notes: Interior furniture and fireplace animations. Dark warm palette.

description: Potion bottle item sprites. Includes PSD source files.
usage: Inventory items, consumables, potion icons

visual.palette: rich warm browns, teal accent, cork tan
visual.notes: Stylized cartoon potions with thick outlines. Zelda/adventure game aesthetic. Pairs with swordsandshields style.

description: RPG building and house sprites. Includes PSD source files.
usage: Overworld buildings, towns, villages

visual.palette: brown wood, grey stone, muted medieval
visual.notes: Top-down furniture and building interiors. Same style family as rpgworlds* packs.

description: Character portrait illustrations for RPG dialogue and character screens. Includes PSD source files.
usage: Dialogue boxes, character selection screens, party UI

visual.palette: realistic skin tones, dark moody backgrounds, desaturated
visual.notes: Realistic painted character portraits. Dramatic lighting. Suited for dialogue boxes or character screens.

description: Massive icon pack with 1700+ RPG game icons across many categories: weapons, armor, consumables, materials, skills, accessories.
usage: Inventory items, equipment slots, loot, skill icons — comprehensive RPG UI icon set

visual.palette: varied, bright classic RPG colors
visual.notes: Classic 16-bit style RPG icon sheet. Massive variety. Standard RPGMaker icon format.

description: RPG inventory item icons version 1. Includes PSD source files.
usage: Inventory UI, item pickups, loot drops

visual.palette: varied, muted RPG tones
visual.notes: Small pixel art inventory items. Similar scale/style to rpggame1700plusicons.

description: RPG items icon set version 3 — equipment, consumables, and misc items.
usage: Item icons for inventory, shops, drops

visual.palette: dark backgrounds, metallic greys, reds, golds
visual.notes: Painted armor/equipment icons with decorative dark border. Semi-realistic rendering. Pairs with painted icon packs.

description: Small pixel art weapons sprite sheet.
usage: Weapon icons or equippable sprites

visual.palette: varied, bright colors, classic RPG
visual.notes: Dense sprite sheet of many weapon types. Very small scale. Classic 16-bit RPG feel.

description: Survival-themed RPG character with animation states. Includes Aseprite source files.
usage: Survival game player character, post-apocalyptic or wilderness RPG

visual.palette: warm orange/red hair, muted earth tones
visual.notes: Top-down survival character with full animation states. Slightly larger than RPGMaker default scale.

description: RPG weapon illustrations version 1 — swords, axes, bows, etc. Includes PSD source files.
usage: Weapon item icons, inventory, equipment screens

visual.palette: realistic — dark steels, warm wood browns, metallic
visual.notes: Highly detailed realistic weapon paintings. Full transparency. Best for UI/inventory at larger sizes.

description: Decorative prop sprites for RPG world environments. Includes PSD source files.
usage: Environment decoration, map detailing

visual.palette: muted medieval — reds, greys, greens
visual.notes: Animated flags and decorative props. Part of rpgworlds style family.

description: Grassland biome tileset for RPG worlds. Includes PSD source files.
usage: Overworld grassland maps, fields, plains

visual.palette: deep reds, dark purple bark, muted fantasy
visual.notes: Animated trees with autumn/fantasy red foliage. Cohesive with other rpgworlds* packs.

description: House and interior sprites for RPG worlds. Includes PSD source files.
usage: Building interiors, house rooms, indoor environments

visual.palette: dark wood browns, grey stone, muted
visual.notes: Interior props — log piles, anvils, crates, wells, shields. Consistent with rpgworlds family.

description: Marshland/swamp biome tileset for RPG worlds. Includes PSD source files.
usage: Swamp biomes, marsh environments, wetlands

visual.palette: very dark earthy brown, near-black, murky
visual.notes: Very dark swamp/marsh tileset. Animated bubble effects. Pairs with rpgworlds family.

description: Snowy landscape tileset for RPG worlds. Includes PSD source files.
usage: Winter biomes, snow environments, icy lands

visual.palette: blue-grey, white, cold tones with green pines
visual.notes: Snowy rocks, pine trees, frozen decor. Consistent rpgworlds style.

description: Large bundle of 2D character sprites by Segel. Includes Spriter (SCML) animation files and PSD sources.
usage: RPG characters with skeletal animation support (Spriter), player and NPC sprites

visual.render_method: illustrated, smooth cel-shaded with thick outlines
visual.palette: clean, saturated, classic anime-adjacent colors
visual.notes: Large chibi-style characters for side-scrolling. Spriter SCML skeletal animation. Very high quality. Pairs with 2dcutecharacterspack aesthetic.

description: Snow-covered forest tileset with animated elements. Includes Aseprite source files.
usage: Winter forest biomes, snowy outdoor environments

visual.palette: light blue, grey-white, icy cold tones
visual.notes: Very small pixel art. Icy chest animations. Cold/winter palette.

description: Sword and shield weapon/equipment sprites. Includes PSD source files.
usage: Melee weapon and shield icons, equipment UI

visual.render_method: illustrated, flat shading with bold outlines
visual.palette: deep blues, teals, steel greys, gem accents
visual.notes: Stylized cartoon weapons with bold flat shading. Not pixel art. Pairs with potionbottles aesthetic.

description: Comprehensive tropical island asset pack — tiles, animated shorelines, boats, dolphins, cliffs, doors, and more. Includes RPGMaker MV/MZ support and Aseprite sources.
usage: Tropical island maps, ocean shores, water tiles, island structures, RPGMaker-compatible

visual.palette: sandy tan, bright ocean blue, warm tropical
visual.notes: GDM creator. Polished RPGMaker-compatible tileset. Animated shorelines, boats, cliffs. Pairs perfectly with wintervillagegameassets (same creator).

description: Winter village asset pack — tiles, doors, animated elements, cabin/shed structures. RPGMaker MV/MZ compatible.
usage: Winter village maps, snowy town environments, cabin interiors, RPGMaker-compatible

visual.palette: blue-grey, white, cold desaturated winter tones
visual.notes: GDM creator. Winter village buildings, doors, animated elements. Direct sibling to tropicalislandgameassets.
